text.value:
There are multiple README.md files associated with different components and tools within the Azure REST API specifications repository. These README files typically provide guidance on using specific APIs or tools. Here are some notable ones:

1. **General Tools and Scripts:**
   - **Lint-Diff Tool**: [README.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/main/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md) provides documentation for the lint-diff tool used for detecting differences in code linting.
   - **Sample Files Guide**: [README.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/main/documentation/samplefiles/README.md) contains information about sample files intended for use.

2. **Specific API Specifications:**
   - **App Data Plane**: [Readme](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/main/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md)
   - **NGINX Resource Manager**: [Readme](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/main/specification/nginx/resource-manager/readme.md)
   - **Anomaly Detector Cognitive Services**: [Readme](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/main/specification/cognitiveservices/data-plane/AnomalyDetector/readme.md)

3. **Automation Scripts**: There are PowerShell scripts like `Verify-Readme.ps1` and `Service-Level-Readme-Automation-Helpers.ps1` designed to automate and verify specific tasks related to README files.

These files guide developers on the usage and details of specific APIs or tooling within the Azure infrastructure. To get detailed information specific to one of these README files, I can retrieve the content upon request.
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
